results.question: Did NHS Shetland report a surplus or deficit against its resource budget in 2016/17?
results.expected_answer: NHS Shetland delivered an under spend against its Core Revenue Resource Limit (RRL) of £312k for 2016/17, indicating a surplus in the resource budget for ongoing activity. However, there is an underlying recurring deficit in the resource budget for ongoing activity at the close of 2016/17, standing at £1,805k up from £1,462k in 2015/16.
